tcp_client_context_t(3) Library Functions Manual tcp_client_context_t(3)

NAME

tcp_client_context_t - Per-client connection context.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/network/tcp/server.h>

Data Fields


socket_t client_socket
Client connection socket. struct sockaddr_storage addr
Client address. socklen_t addr_len
Address length. void * user_data
User-provided data from config.

Detailed Description

Per-client connection context.

Passed to client handler threads with connection information. The handler is responsible for closing the socket and freeing this structure when done.

Definition at line 114 of file include/ascii-chat/network/tcp/server.h.

Field Documentation
